title: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5: Security and Privacy Controls for Information Systems and Organizations - RA-5
authors: National Institute of Standards and Technology
abstract_text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 provides a catalog of security and privacy controls for information systems and organizations.

sections.title: RA-5 source section
sections.text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 places control RA-5 in the Risk Assessment family. The control title for RA-5 is Vulnerability Monitoring and Scanning. This source section is limited to the named control, its family, and its title for deterministic hard-recall benchmarking.

sections.title: AU-3 distractor section
sections.text: A separate nearby control, AU-3, belongs to the Audit and Accountability family and is titled Content of Audit Records. It is included only as a distractor section for context packing.
